info.title: Trip Planner API
info.description: Collaborative trip planning, itineraries, routes, expenses, and settlements.

post.summary: Sign in with email for development session
Synchronize itinerary days from trip date range

put.summary: Vote for a place on a specific itinerary day

delete.summary: Remove own vote for a place on a specific itinerary day

patch.summary: Update own attendance for itinerary stop
Reorder itinerary stops for a day

post.summary: Create route plan from ordered places
Search Booking accommodations for a trip
Save an accommodation search result as a trip place

patch.summary: Complete or uncomplete a checklist item

get.summary: Reverse geocode coordinates via OpenStreetMap Nominatim
Discover nearby map places via OpenStreetMap Overpass
Fetch place detail from Wikipedia summary API
List active live locations for trip members

patch.summary: Share own live location in a trip

delete.summary: Stop sharing own live location in a trip

get.summary: Get weather forecast for itinerary days and places

post.summary: Generate trip planning insights with OpenAI Agents SDK
Generate AI place and activity suggestions as a verified draft
Generate an AI itinerary draft without mutating trip data
